data: Include 'data' explicitly in your skill set or summary (e.g., 'data analysis', 'data-driven').
dashboard: Add a project where you built a dashboard using Power BI or Tableau.
communication: Mention soft skills like communication and teamwork explicitly.
collaborate: Showcase teamwork or cross-functional collaboration experience.
business: Mention experience working with business stakeholders or solving business problems.
analysis: Add a project or responsibility focused on data or business analysis.
build: Describe how you built a tool, dashboard, or workflow.
convert: Mention situations where you transformed or converted data formats or systems.
categorize: Include examples of how you grouped, tagged, or classified data.
python: Mention experience using Python for scripting, data analysis, or automation.
sql: Include your ability to write and optimize SQL queries.
api: Describe any experience building or using APIs.
react: Mention React projects if applying for frontend roles.
node: Include Node.js experience for backend-related roles.
testing: Mention unit testing or integration testing practices.
aws: Include cloud-related experience (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).
docker: Mention how you've used Docker for deployment or development.
excel: Mention experience using Excel for data analysis, pivot tables, or reporting.
tableau: Add experience building dashboards or reports in Tableau.
powerbi: Include Power BI projects or usage for business intelligence tasks.
machine learning: Highlight any projects or coursework involving machine learning models.
nlp: Mention use of Natural Language Processing in projects like resume analysis or chatbots.
javascript: Showcase your experience using JavaScript for frontend interactivity.
html: Include knowledge of HTML for web development or resume structuring.
css: Mention styling experience using CSS in web projects.
leadership: Add examples where you led a project or team effort.
problem-solving: Include experiences where you solved complex problems or optimized a process.
teamwork: Show how you worked collaboratively in team-based environments.
time management: Mention how you effectively managed time in academic or professional settings.
automate: Describe tasks you automated using scripts or tools.
visualize: Mention tools or libraries used to visualize data (e.g., matplotlib, Tableau).
design: Include design of systems, user interfaces, or databases.
develop: Mention software, models, or workflows you developed.
deploy: Describe deployment of projects to servers, cloud, or production environments.
optimize: Talk about how you improved performance, speed, or accuracy.
finance: Include experience or knowledge related to financial modeling, statements, or tools.
healthcare: Mention projects or work done in the healthcare domain (e.g., medical data analysis).
ecommerce: Add work related to e-commerce platforms, customer data, or user analytics.
education: Include involvement in EdTech, academic research, or tutoring.
